headline: VERIFY AT SOURCE, NOT ON PAPER
subheading: How senior QPs confirm GMP certificates against EudraGMDP and MHRA before they approve a supplier.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition on the theme of authenticating an official pharmaceutical credential against a trusted source database. Centre on a pristine embossed certificate document rendered as a glowing teal hologram, its scope and validity fields abstracted into clean luminous bars, cross-referenced by a thin tracing beam of cyan light against a softly glowing database panel showing rows of verified site entries as abstract glassy cells. A subtle magnifying lens element refracts the light, suggesting independent scrutiny; one faint amber-red flag node sits among the rows as a non-compliance signal. Floating frosted-glass vials and a calm laboratory-office surface recede into deep navy shadow with shallow depth of field. Layered translucent data lattices and verification checkmarks abstracted into geometric glints, a fresh-green accent thread weaving through teal and cyan, soft reflective surfaces, premium and authoritative mood, cool professional side lighting. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
